@graph.name: Transfer Pricing in Karnataka | Virtual Auditor
@graph.description: Transfer Pricing in Karnataka. From ₹75,000. FCA, ACS, CFE, IBBI RV. Transfer pricing study, documentation, benchmarking, TP audi. Contact +91 99622 60333.

mainEntity.name: When is transfer pricing documentation required?

acceptedAnswer.text: When aggregate value of international transactions exceeds ₹1 crore, or specified domestic transactions exceed ₹20 crore.
Chartered accountant's report certifying arm's length nature of international and domestic related party transactions. Due by 31st October.
Yes. We handle TPO proceedings, DRP references, and ITAT appeals for transfer pricing disputes.

mainEntity.name: Do you provide transfer pricing services in Karnataka?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes. Virtual Auditor serves clients across Karnataka from our offices in Chennai, Bangalore, and Mumbai. We handle the complete process remotely with in-person meetings available at our nearest office. Contact +91 99622 60333.

mainEntity.name: What is the ROC jurisdiction for Karnataka?

acceptedAnswer.text: Companies registered in Karnataka fall under ROC Bangalore. Virtual Auditor handles all ROC filings for Karnataka-registered companies.

mainEntity.name: What is the stamp duty for company registration in Karnataka?

acceptedAnswer.text: Stamp duty in Karnataka: 0.5% on authorised capital (max ₹25L). Professional tax: ₹2,500/year. Contact us for exact computation based on your authorised capital.

howToSteps.text: Identify comparable companies and compute arm's length range
howToSteps.name: Step 2: Benchmarking
